description_long: This object consists of two ornate high-backed chairs with red upholstered cushions and decorative button tufting, positioned on either side of a small, square wooden table. The chairs feature wooden frames with turned legs and finials, and padded armrests matching the seat and backrest. The table is simple, with a single pedestal base, and holds a white bottle and two white cups or candles. All elements rest on a rectangular wooden floor mat, giving the set a formal, almost regal appearance. The materials and design suggest a vintage or classical style, suitable for upscale urban settings such as cafes, restaurants, or public squares. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the chairs and table likely made from solid wood and upholstered fabric.
description: A pair of ornate, red-upholstered high chairs with wooden frames flank a small wooden table, all set on a wooden mat. The set exudes a vintage, formal style with decorative details and matching accessories.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of both high-backed chairs, the table, and the arrangement of white objects on the tabletop.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the decorative red upholstery, button tufting, and the symmetrical placement of the chairs and table.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the chairs and the tabletop items.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backs of the high chairs and the table, with the bottle and cups visible from behind.
